ddls:
CREATE TABLE "heritage_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heritage site */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the heritage place */,
  "place_address" TEXT /* Street address of the heritage site */,
  "town" TEXT /* Town where the heritage site is located */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postal code of the town */,
  "thr_status" TEXT /* Current status of the heritage site (e.g., Permanently Registered) */,
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the municipality responsible for the site */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of heritage site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographic latitude of the heritage site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographic longitude of the heritage site */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the heritage site was built */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the heritage site */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Whether the site is open to the public */,
  "visitation_rules" TEXT /* Rules for visiting the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heritage_sites_municipality_id FOREIGN KEY ("municipality_id") REFERENCES municipalities ("municipality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heritage_sites_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES heritage_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "municipalities" (
  "municipality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each municipality */,
  "municipality_name" TEXT /* Name of the municipality */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the municipality office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the municipality */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the municipality */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the municipality was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("municipality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heritage_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of heritage site */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the heritage type (e.g., Building, Monument) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the heritage type */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to a representative image of the heritage type */,
  "icon_path" TEXT /* Path to an icon representing the heritage type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site related to this status change */,
  "status_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status change occurred */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status assigned to the heritage site */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the status change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the site information */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the site */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site the comment relates to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been deleted */,
  "deleted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deleted the comment */,
  "deleted_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_deleted_by FOREIGN KEY ("deleted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site the attachment relates to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document or image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, document) */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site associated with the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is scheduled */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within the heritage site where the event takes place */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organization or individual organizing the event */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the event */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Whether the event is private or public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site related to the funding */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the funding was allocated */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding (e.g., grant, donation) */,
  "funding_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose for which the funding is allocated */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Whether the funding is recurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restoration_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restoration project */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the heritage site being restored */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the restoration project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "progress" REAL /* Percentage of project completion */,
  "issues" TEXT /* Any issues or challenges faced during the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restoration_projects_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES heritage_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the role */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
